      It provides a JavaScript-inspired syntax with built-in functions for rapid bot creation, without the overhead of external dependencies.</p>

      <h3>Key Features</h3>
      <ul>
        <li>Simplified command-based structure</li>
        <li>Predefined variables for user, chat, and message context</li>
        <li>Built-in API methods for sending messages, keyboards, and inline responses</li>
        <li>Support for HTTP requests, global variables, and modular extensions</li>
        <li>Support both synchronous and asynchronous execution, with 80% sync and 20% aync behaviour where <code>await</code>, <code>Promise</code> are valid</li>
      </ul>

      <!-- 2. Getting Started -->
      <h2 id="getting-started">Getting Started<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h2>
      <p>This section explains the basic steps to create and test your first Telegram bot using TBL.</p>

      <h3>Step 1: Create a Telegram Bot</h3>
      <ol>
        <li>Open Telegram and search for <a href="https://t.me/BotFather" target="_blank">@BotFather</a>.</li>
        <li>Send <code>/newbot</code> to create a new bot.</li>
        <li>Choose a name and a username (must end with <code>bot</code>).</li>
        <li>Copy the generated bot token.</li>
      </ol>

      <div class="code-container">
        <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-keyword">const</span> botToken = <span class="hljs-string">"123456789:ABCdefGhIJKlmNoPQRsTUVwxyZ"</span>;</code></pre>
        <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
      </div>

      <h3>Step 2: Register on TBL Platform</h3>
      <ol>
        <li>Log into the TBL platform.</li>
        <li>Click "Create New Bot".</li>
        <li>Enter the bot name and paste the token from BotFather.</li>
        <li>Click "Create" to initialize your bot.</li>
      </ol>

      <h3>Step 3: Add Basic Commands</h3>
      <p>Create a <code>/start</code> command for user onboarding:</p>
      <div class="code-container">
        <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Hello "</span> + user.<span class="hljs-property">first_name</span> + <span class="hljs-string">"! Welcome to my bot."</span>)</code></pre>
        <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
      </div>

<!-- What's New -->
<h2 id="whats-new">What's New in TBL<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h2>
<p>The latest TBL update introduces <b>major new features</b> for developers, giving more control, flexibility, and integration possibilities.  
Here’s a breakdown of everything new:</p>

<h3> 1. Webhook Support</h3>
<p>TBL now supports <b><a href="#class-webhook">Webhook</a> mode</b>. You can call bot commands directly using HTTP requests — perfect for building websites, dashboards, or automation tools that interact with your bot in real-time.</p>

<h3> 2. New <code>Bot.read()</code> Method</h3>
<p>A new method <code>Bot.read("/command")</code> allows you to <b>read another command’s source code</b> as a string.  
It’s ideal for dynamic command management, code previews, or admin tools.</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Example usage</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> code = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">read</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"/start"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Here's the code for /start:\n"</span> + code)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3> 3. Buffer Support</h3>
<p>TBL’s sandbox now supports the safe version of Node.js’s <b><a href="https://www.w3schools.com/nodejs/nodejs_buffer.asp">Buffer</a></b> class.  
You can process binary data, files, and base64 strings directly in your commands.</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Example</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> buf = <span class="hljs-title class_">Buffer</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">from</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"TBL Rocks!"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Buffer length: "</span> + buf.<span class="hljs-property">length</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>
<p><b>Use case:</b> Work with files, encodings, and binary data safely inside the TBL VM.</p>

<h3>4. Improved <code>Bot.runCommand()</code></h3>
<p><code>Bot.runCommand()</code> has been improved — it now runs inside <b>any update type</b> (messages, callbacks, inline queries, webhooks, etc.).  
Previously, it only worked with message updates.</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Works everywhere now</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">runCommand</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"/start"</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>
<p><b>Use case:</b> Trigger other commands programmatically — regardless of where the update originated.</p>

<h3> 5. Dynamic Command Handlers</h3>
<p>TBL now supports <b><a href="#cmd-dynamic">Dynamic Commands</a></b> — allowing any <code>update type</code> to have its own handler in the form <code>/handle_{type}</code>.  
For example, when a user joins a group, TBL automatically runs <code>/handle_chat_member</code> if it exists.</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">/*Command: /handle_chat_member*/</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"👋 Welcome "</span> + user.<span class="hljs-property">first_name</span> + <span class="hljs-string">"!"</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

z-index: initial !important;">Forum & Chat Providers</span></div></p>
<ul>
  <li><code>/handle_chat_member</code> → runs when user status changes</li>
  <li><code>/handle_poll_answer</code> → runs on poll responses</li>
  <li><code>/handle_message_reaction</code> → runs on new reactions</li>
  <li><code>/handle_chat_boost</code> → runs on chat boost updates</li>
</ul>
<p><b>Special Commands</b> like <code>/inline_query</code> and <code>/channel_update</code> are still supported and prioritized.</p>

<h3> Summary</h3>
<ul>
  <li><b>Webhook:</b> Trigger commands via HTTP requests.</li>
  <li><b>Bot.read():</b> Read another command’s source code.</li>
  <li><b>Buffer:</b> Safe support for Node.js Buffer class.</li>
  <li><b>Bot.runCommand():</b> Works in all update types.</li>
  <li><b>Dynamic Commands:</b> Handle any Telegram update using <code>/handle_{type}</code> pattern.</li>
</ul>

<!-- 3. Command Structure -->
<h2 id="commands">Command Structure<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h2>
<p>Commands are the <b>core building blocks</b> of TBL. Instead of using event listeners like <code>bot.on()</code>, TBL follows a <b>command-driven model</b>.

<h3 id="cmd-anatomy">Anatomy of a Command<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>A command can include these parts:</p>
<ul>
  <li><b>Command Name</b> → the trigger (e.g. <code>/start</code>, <code>hi</code>, <code>/help</code>)</li>
  <li><b>Answer</b> → a quick static reply before running any code (supports Markdown)</li>
  <li><b>Code Block</b> → logic written in TBL’s JavaScript-like syntax</li>
  <li><b>Keyboard</b> → optional buttons for easy replies</li>
  <li><b>Aliases</b> → alternative triggers for the same command</li>
  <li><b>Need Reply</b> → makes the bot wait for the next user input</li>
</ul>

<h3 id="cmd-example">Example Command<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<ul>
  <li><b>command:</b> <code>/start</code></li>
  <li><b>answer:</b> <code>Welcome! Choose an option:</code></li>
  <li><b>keyboard:</b> <code>Help, About\nContact</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Hello "</span> + user.<span class="hljs-property">first_name</span> + <span class="hljs-string">"!"</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>
<p>In this example:</p>
<ul>
  <li><b>Command</b>: <code>/start</code> triggers the command</li>
  <li><b>Answer</b>: bot instantly replies with "Welcome! Choose an option:"</li>
  <li><b>Keyboard</b>: provides 2 rows of buttons → [Help, About] and [Contact]</li>
  <li><b>Code</b>: sends a personalized message using the user’s first name</li>
</ul>

<h3 id="cmd-answer">Answer<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>Answers are quick static messages. <div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">/*Command: /help
answer: I can do these things:
- /start → Start the bot
- /about → Info about me*/</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Extra help details..."</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="cmd-needreply">Need Reply<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>If <code>need_reply</code> is set to <code>true</code>, the bot waits for the next user message before continuing.</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">/*command: /ask
answer: What is your favorite color?
need_reply: true*/</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"You answered: "</span> + message)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="cmd-aliases">Aliases<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>Aliases let one command have multiple triggers.</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">/*Command: /hello
aliases: hi, hey, hola*/</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Hello there!"</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="cmd-keyboard">Keyboards<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>Commands can show custom keyboards:</p>
<ul>
  <li><b>Same row</b>: use commas → <code>Yes,No</code></li>
  <li><b>New row</b>: use <code>\n</code> → <code>Yes\nNo</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">/*Command: /menu
answer: Choose an option:
keyboard: Yes,No\nMaybe*/</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Waiting for your choice..."</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

z-index: initial !important;">Forum & Chat Providers</span></div></p>
<ul>
  <li><b>@</b> → Initialization (runs before any other command)</li>
  <li><b>!</b> → Error handler (catches runtime errors)</li>
  <li><b>@@</b> → Post-processing (runs after every command)</li>
  <li><b>*</b> → Wildcard (fallback when no command matches; master handler for all update types)</li>
  <li><b>/inline_query</b> → Handles inline queries if defined; otherwise handled by <code>*</code></li>
  <li><b>/channel_update</b> → Handles channel updates if defined; otherwise handled by <code>*</code></li>
</ul>

<h3 id="cmd-dynamic">Dynamic Update Handlers<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>TBL now supports <b>dynamic command handlers</b> for every Telegram update type.</p>
<p>Any update (other than messages) can be handled automatically by creating a command following this pattern:</p>
<div class="alert info">
  <i class="fas fa-bolt"></i>
  <div><code>/handle_{update_type}</code> → will be executed for that specific update type.</div>
</div>

<p>For example:</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">/*Command: /handle_chat_member*/</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"A chat member update occurred!"</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<p>This feature works for all update types listed in the <a href="https://core.telegram.org/bots/api#update">Telegram Bot API</a>, including:</p>
<ul>
  <li><code>my_chat_member</code></li>
  <li><code>chat_member</code></li>
  <li><code>chat_join_request</code></li>
  <li><code>business_message</code></li>
  <li><code>edited_business_message</code></li>
  <li><code>poll</code></li>
  <li><code>poll_answer</code></li>
  <li><code>message_reaction</code></li>
  <li><code>message_reaction_count</code></li>
  <li><code>chat_boost</code></li>
  <li><code>removed_chat_boost</code></li>
  <li>...and all other Telegram update types</li>
</ul>

<h3 id="cmd-inline">/inline_query<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>Handles inline mode queries (when users type <code>@yourbot query</code> in Telegram).</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-title class_">Command</span>: /inline_query
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"You searched: "</span> + request.<span class="hljs-property">query</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="cmd-channel">/channel_update<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>Handles channel posts automatically.</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-title class_">Command</span>: /channel_update
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"New channel post received!"</span>)</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="cmd-best">Best Practices<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<ul>
  <li>Use <b>clear names</b> → <code>/buy_ticket</code>, not <code>/cmd69</code></li>
  <li>Use <b>aliases</b> for multiple triggers or languages</li>
  <li>Always define <b>!</b> to avoid silent errors</li>
  <li>Keep commands <b>modular</b> (one task per command)</li>
  <li>Use <code>/handle_{type}</code> for any special update type</li>
  <li>Test async code carefully, especially with <code>await</code></li>
</ul>
<div class="alert warning">
  <i class="fas fa-exclamation-triangle"></i>
  <div>Always define a <b>!</b> command to capture and handle runtime errors.</div>
</div>

<h3 id="content">content<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>Contains the response body from an HTTP request.

</p><h3 id="inspect">inspect()<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>Helper function to print any object for debugging.</p>
<p>like if you did <code>inspect(data)</code> it will return bot <a href="#bot">Details</a></p>

<h3 id="msg">msg<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p><code>msg</code> is a simplified version of <code>update</code>. It’s only available for <code>message</code> updates.</p>
<p>Whenever a message update is received, <code>msg</code> will contain the same object as <code>update.message</code>.</p>

z-index: initial !important;">Email & Messaging</span></div></p>

<h3 id="require">require<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>import functions from another command easily. <b><a href="#require-reuse">Learn More Here</a></b></p>


<!-- Global Classes -->
<h2 id="classes">Global Classes<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h2>
<p>
  TBL provides several predefined classes. These classes give you direct access
  to Telegram features, user data, and external utilities.
  The most important one is <code>Api</code>, which works as a direct wrapper
  for the official <a href="https://core.telegram.org/bots/api" target="_blank">Telegram Bot API</a>.
</p>

<h3 id="class-api">Api<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  The <code>Api</code> class lets you call any Telegram method.
  You can use it directly, with callbacks, async/await, or with chained message methods.
</p>

<div class="alert info">
  <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i>
  <div>Api methods are case <b>insensitive</b>. You can use both <code>sendMessage</code> or <code>sendmessage</code>.</div>
</div>

<h4 id="api-simple">1. Simple Usage<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h4>
<p>
  The simplest way to use <code>Api</code> is to call a method directly.
  No <code>await</code> is needed. The message will be sent in the background.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Send a simple message</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Hello user!"</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">// Send a photo</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendPhoto</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">photo</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"https://example.com/cat.jpg"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">caption</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Cute cat"</span> })
  </code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h4 id="api-onrun">2. Using <code>on_run</code> Callback<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h4>
<p>
  You can pass <code>on_run</code> to any Api call to run another command when the call finishes.
  Useful if you want to continue logic in a separate command.

  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Get bot info and continue in another command</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getMe</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">on_run</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"afterGetMe"</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">// Inside "afterGetMe" command</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (options.<span class="hljs-property">ok</span>) {
  <span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Bot username: @"</span> + options.<span class="hljs-property">result</span>.<span class="hljs-property">username</span> })
}
  </code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>

<h4 id="api-async">3. Using Async / Await<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h4>
<p>
  For sequential logic, you can use <code>async/await</code>.
  This lets you store results in variables and act on them immediately.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> me = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getMe</span>()
<span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (me.<span class="hljs-property">ok</span>) {
  <span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"My bot id is "</span> + me.<span class="hljs-property">result</span>.<span class="hljs-property">id</span> })
}

<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> sent = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Hello again!"</span> })
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(sent) <span class="hljs-comment">// Full Telegram response</span>
  </code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

z-index: initial !important;">Internet Software</span></div></p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Send a message and chain methods</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> data = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>({<span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Hello user!"</span>})
<span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> data.<span class="hljs-title function_">pin</span>()                          <span class="hljs-comment">// Pin the message</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> data.<span class="hljs-title function_">react</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"👍"</span>)                     <span class="hljs-comment">// Add reaction</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> data.<span class="hljs-title function_">editText</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Updated text"</span>)       <span class="hljs-comment">// Edit message text</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> data.<span class="hljs-title function_">reply</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Replied Message"</span>)   <span class="hljs-comment">// Reply to message</span>

  </code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h4>Supported Chained Methods</h4>
<ul>
  <li>editText(text, {...options})</li>
  <li>editCaption(caption, {...options})</li>
  <li>editMedia(media, {...options})</li>
  <li>editReplyMarkup(rm, {...options})</li>
  <li>delete()</li>
  <li>pin(dn = false)</li> <code>dn → disable notification</code>
  <li>unpin()</li>
  <li>react(emoji, big = false)</li>
  <li>forward(to, {...options})</li>
  <li>copy(to, {...options})</li>
  <li>reply(text, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyPhoto(photo, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyVideo(video, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyAudio(audio, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyVoice(voice, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyDocument(doc, {...options})</li>
  <li>replySticker(sticker, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyAnimation(anim, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyLocation(lat, lon, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyContact(phone, fn, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyPoll(q, options, {...options})</li>
  <li>replyDice(emoji="", {...options})</li>
  <li>get()</li> <i>Get message id</i>
  <li>downloadFile()</li>
  <li>editLiveLocation(lat, lon, {...options})</li>
  <li>stopLiveLocation({...options})</li>
  <li>stopPoll({...options})</li>
</ul>
<h4 id="api-dynamic">4. Dynamic Methods in <code>Api.xxx</code><i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h4>

<p>
  Sometimes a specific Telegram Bot API method may not exist inside the built-in
  <code>TBL Api</code> class. In such cases, you don’t have to wait for an update—TBL
  allows you to call any official Telegram method dynamically using:

z-index: initial !important;">Text & Instant Messaging</span></div></p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">call</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"methodName"</span>, { <span class="hljs-comment">/* parameters */</span> })
  </code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<p>
  This is extremely useful when Telegram introduces a new API feature. As long as
  Telegram supports the method, you can use it immediately through
  <code>Api.call()</code>.
</p>

<h5>Example: Calling <code>getChat</code> Dynamically</h5>
<p>
  Suppose <code>getChat</code> is not available in TBL's built-in methods. You can still
  execute it like this:
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">call</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"getChat"</span>, {
  <span class="hljs-attr">chat_id</span>: <span class="hljs-number">4444443444</span>
})
  </code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<p>
  <strong>How it works:</strong><br>
  • <code>"getChat"</code> is the official Telegram method name<br>
  • The second argument is an object with parameters<br>
  • TBL automatically sends this request to Telegram and returns the response<br>
</p>

<p>
  This ensures your bot can instantly use any Telegram method—even those not
  built into TBL yet.
</p>
<!-- Bot Class -->
<h2 id="class-bot">Bot Class<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h2>
<p>
  The <b>Bot</b> class is used for controlling your bot directly.
  It provides methods for running commands, sending messages, and managing persistent bot-level properties.
  Unlike <code>Api</code>, the <code>Bot</code> methods are designed to be easier to use inside commands.

<h3 id="bot-run">1. Command Execution<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  You can tell the bot to run another command. This is useful if you want to move the user to a new flow.
  These methods don’t return any value – they just execute the command.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Run another command</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">runCommand</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"/start"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Run with options</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">runCommand</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"/start"</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">key</span>: <span class="hljs-number">111</span> })
<span class="hljs-comment">// key is available now in /start and accessible with options.key</span>
</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<script type="text/javascript">
     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
</script>
<h3 id="bot-read">2. Reading Command and its Code<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  The <code>Bot.read()</code> method returns only the <b>raw source code</b> of a command as a plain string.<br>
  It <b>does not</b> include metadata such as <code>answer</code>, <code>keyboard</code>, or <code>need_reply</code>.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Read the raw code of a command</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> code = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">read</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"/start"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Display or use the command code</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(code)
</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<hr>

<h3 id="bot-read-command">3. Reading Full Command Object<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  The <code>Bot.readCommand()</code> method returns a full command object, including both
  the code and all metadata fields like <code>aliases</code>, <code>keyboard</code>,
  <code>need_reply</code>, and more.

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Read full command structure</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> cmd = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">readCommand</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"/start"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-title class_">JSON</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">stringify</span>(cmd, <span class="hljs-literal">null</span>, <span class="hljs-number">2</span>))
</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<p>Example response:</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-json hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-punctuation">{</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">"code"</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">:</span> <span class="hljs-string">"const {random} = require(\"/send\");\n\nconst x = random(1, 100);\nBot.sendMessage(\"Random: \" + x);"</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">"answer"</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">:</span> <span class="hljs-literal"><span class="hljs-keyword">null</span></span><span class="hljs-punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">"keyboard"</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">:</span> <span class="hljs-literal"><span class="hljs-keyword">null</span></span><span class="hljs-punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">"aliases"</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">:</span> <span class="hljs-punctuation">[</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">]</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">"allow_only_group"</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">:</span> <span class="hljs-literal"><span class="hljs-keyword">false</span></span><span class="hljs-punctuation">,</span>
  <span class="hljs-attr">"need_reply"</span><span class="hljs-punctuation">:</span> <span class="hljs-literal"><span class="hljs-keyword">false</span></span>
<span class="hljs-punctuation">}</span>
</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="bot-send">3. Sending Messages<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  These methods send messages or media to the current chat.
  They return the <code>Telegram API response</code> (if awaited).
  Using <code>await</code> is optional – you can wait for the result or send without waiting.
</p>
<p>With <code>await</code> it also supports <a href="#api-chained">Api Chained methods</a>.</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// === Send Text ===</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Simple text</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Hello user!"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Text (object format)</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Hello user!"</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">// With HTML formatting</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> res = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Hello friend"</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">parse_mode</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"HTML"</span> })
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(res)


<span class="hljs-comment">// === Send Keyboard ===</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// String format</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendKeyboard</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Choose an option:"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"Yes,No"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Object format</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendKeyboard</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Choose an option:"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">keyboard</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Yes,No"</span> })


<span class="hljs-comment">// === Send Media (supports string & object) ===</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Photo</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendPhoto</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"photo.jpg"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendPhoto</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">photo</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"photo.jpg"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">caption</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Nice view!"</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">// Document</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendDocument</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"file.pdf"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"Here is your pdf"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendDocument</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">document</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"file.pdf"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">caption</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Here is your file"</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">// Audio</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendAudio</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"music.mp3"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendAudio</span>({
  <span class="hljs-attr">audio</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"music.mp3"</span>,
  <span class="hljs-attr">caption</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Here is your music"</span>
})

<span class="hljs-comment">// Video</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendVideo</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"video.mp4"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendVideo</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">video</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"video.mp4"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">caption</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Watch this"</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">// Voice</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendVoice</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"voice.ogg"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendVoice</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">voice</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"voice.ogg"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">caption</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Voice note"</span> })


<span class="hljs-comment">// === Debugging ===</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">user</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Alice"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-number">123</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">//Or multiple data inspect</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"User data:"</span>, user, { <span class="hljs-attr">id</span>: <span class="hljs-number">123</span> }, someArray)

<span class="hljs-comment">// === API Chaining Example ===</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> data = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Pinned message"</span>)
data.<span class="hljs-title function_">pin</span>() <span class="hljs-comment">// pin the previous message</span>
</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>
<h3 id="bot-props">4. Properties<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Bot properties are simple key-value storage.
  They let you save data that belongs to the bot itself (not a specific user).
  All property methods are synchronous, so <code>await</code> is not required.

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Set properties</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"version"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"1.2.3"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"String"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"config"</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">apiKey</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"xyz"</span> }, <span class="hljs-string">"Json"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get values</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> v = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"version"</span>)   <span class="hljs-comment">// "1.2.3"</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> c = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"config"</span>)    <span class="hljs-comment">// { apiKey: "xyz" }</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Delete one property</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">del</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"version"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get all properties</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> all = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getAll</span>()

<span class="hljs-comment">// Delete all</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">delAll</span>()

<span class="hljs-comment">// Check if a property exists</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> has = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">has</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"config"</span>)  <span class="hljs-comment">// true</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Count all properties</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> count = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">count</span>()      <span class="hljs-comment">// e.g. 1</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get all property names</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> names = <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getNames</span>()   <span class="hljs-comment">// ["config"]</span>
</code></pre>

<ul>
  <li><b>String</b> – Plain text or automatically converted values.</li>
  <li><b>Number</b> – Numeric values (integers or floats).</li>
  <li><b>Boolean</b> – True or false values.</li>
  <li><b>List</b> – Arrays (ordered lists).</li>
  <li><b>Date</b> – Date objects.</li>
  <li><b>Json</b> – Objects or arrays (stored as JSON).</li>
</ul>

<div class="alert info">
  <i class="fas fa-info-circle"></i>
  <div>The <code>type</code> parameter is optional in <b>Bot.set()</b>.
    If not provided, the type is automatically detected.</div>
</div>

<h3 id="bot-prop-alias">5. Property Aliases<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  All property methods have short aliases.
  They work exactly the same, just different names.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Setting values</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">setProp</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"theme"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"dark"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"String"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">setProperty</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"lang"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"en"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"String"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Getting values</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getProp</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"theme"</span>)        <span class="hljs-comment">// "dark"</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getProperty</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"lang"</span>)     <span class="hljs-comment">// "en"</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Deleting values</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">delProp</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"theme"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">delProperty</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"lang"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get all / delete all</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getAllProp</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getAllProperty</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">delAllProp</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">delAllProperty</span>()

<span class="hljs-comment">// Checking and counting</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">hasProp</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"theme"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">countProps</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getPropNames</span>()
</code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>
<h3 id="bot-getusers">6. Get Users<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  The <code>Bot.getUsers()</code> method returns an array of user IDs who have interacted with your bot.
  This method <b>must be awaited</b> as it returns a Promise.
</p>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes"><span class="hljs-comment">// Get all users</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> data = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getUsers</span>()

<span class="hljs-comment">// Returns type is Array</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// Must needs to be awaited</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">/*
Filter available

getUsers({ chatType: "group/private/channel" , premiumOnly: true })

Filters are totally optional, by default we return all chats exclude channel ids

*/</span>

<span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>({<span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: data})

<span class="hljs-comment">// To get your bot user's, say goodbye to manually store in props</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// We have this new feature in TBL</span>
</code></pre>
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">//This feature is not 100% stable now</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// Examples with filters</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get only group chats</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> groupUsers = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getUsers</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">chatType</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"group"</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get only private chats</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> privateUsers = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getUsers</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">chatType</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"private"</span> })

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get only premium users</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> premiumUsers = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getUsers</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">premiumOnly</span>: <span class="hljs-literal">true</span> }) <span class="hljs-comment">//these are private chats </span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Send the results</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Group users: "</span> + groupUsers.<span class="hljs-property">length</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Premium users: "</span> + premiumUsers.<span class="hljs-property">length</span>)
</code></pre>
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>
<p>
  <b>Note:</b> By default, channel IDs are excluded from the results. 
  Use <code>chatType: "channel"</code> to specifically get channel IDs if needed.
</p>
<h3 id="api-vs-bot">Api vs Bot — What’s the Difference?<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Both <code>Api</code> and <code>Bot</code> can send messages, but they serve different purposes.

z-index: initial !important;">Programming</span></div></p>

<h4>Api</h4>
<ul>
  <li>Provides access to <b>all Telegram API methods</b></li>
  <li>Methods are <b>case-insensitive</b></li>
  <li>Supports <code>Api.call()</code> for any Telegram method (even new ones)</li>
  <li>Best for full, raw Telegram API control</li>
</ul>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">chat_id</span>: user.<span class="hljs-property">telegramid</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">text</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Hello from Api!"</span> })
<span class="hljs-title class_">Api</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">call</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"getChat"</span>, { <span class="hljs-attr">chat_id</span>: <span class="hljs-number">123456</span> })
  </code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h4>Bot</h4>
<ul>
  <li>High-level helper designed for TBL commands</li>

  <li>Only includes commonly used helper methods (sendMessage, sendPhoto, runCommand, properties, etc.)</li>
  <li>Methods are <b>case-sensitive</b></li>
  <li>Supports both string and object formats</li>
  <li>Includes tools like <code>Bot.inspect()</code> and bot properties</li>
</ul>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-javascript hljs" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Hello from Bot!"</span>)       <span class="hljs-comment">// auto chat_id</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendPhoto</span>({ <span class="hljs-attr">photo</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"pic.jpg"</span> })      <span class="hljs-comment">// simple helper</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Debug:"</span>, user, chat)        <span class="hljs-comment">// multi-argument inspect</span>
  </code></pre>
  <button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<p><b>Summary:</b>  
<code>Api</code> gives full access to every Telegram method.  
<code>Bot</code> provides simplified helpers for common tasks inside commands.</p>
<!-- HTTP Class -->
<h2 id="class-http">HTTP Class<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h2>
<!-- docad -->
<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display: block; height: 280px;" data-ad-client="ca-pub-2719295794573158" data-ad-slot="4335444793" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true" data-adsbygoogle-status="done"><div id="aswift_10_host" style="border: none; height: 280px; width: 885px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; position: relative; visibility: visible; background-color: transparent; display: inline-block;"></div></ins>

     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
</script>
<p>
The <b>HTTP</b> class allows your bot to make external API requests (GET, POST, etc.) and handle responses flexibly.  
It supports direct calls with <code>await</code>, chaining commands for success/error handling.

<h3 id="http-get">1. GET Requests<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>Simple GET request:</p>

<div class="code-container">
<pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// GET request using direct URL</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> data = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-variable constant_">HTTP</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(data)
<span class="hljs-comment">// we will have data.content(raw string ), data.headers, data.cookies, data.data(parsed)</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">/* Demo data
{
  ok: true,
  status: 200,
  statusText: 'OK',
  content: '{"ok":true,"ping":true}', //content is String
  data: {
    ok: true,
    ping: true
  }, // if it JSON then auto parsed
  headers: {
    'content-type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8'
    ...more
  },
  cookies: []
}
*/</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// GET request using object with options</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> data2 = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-variable constant_">HTTP</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>({
  <span class="hljs-attr">url</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/2"</span>,
  <span class="hljs-attr">headers</span>: { <span class="hljs-string">"Authorization"</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Bearer ABC123"</span> }
})
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(data2)
</code></pre>
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="http-post">2. POST Requests<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>POST request example:</p>

<div class="code-container">
<pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// POST request</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> payload = { <span class="hljs-attr">name</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Alice"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">age</span>: <span class="hljs-number">25</span> }
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> response = <span class="hljs-keyword">await</span> <span class="hljs-variable constant_">HTTP</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">post</span>({
  <span class="hljs-attr">url</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts"</span>,
  <span class="hljs-attr">body</span>: payload,
  <span class="hljs-attr">headers</span>: { <span class="hljs-string">"Authorization"</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"Bearer ABC123"</span> }
})
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(response)
</code></pre>
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="http-callback">3. Success / Error Commands with <code>tbl_options</code><i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
You can define commands to run automatically on success or error.  
If <code>error</code> command is missing, the <code>success</code> command will run instead.

<div class="code-container">
<pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// HTTP GET with success/error commands</span>
<span class="hljs-variable constant_">HTTP</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>({
  <span class="hljs-attr">url</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/todos/1"</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">success</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"onSuccess"</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">error</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"onError"</span>,
    <span class="hljs-attr">tbl_options</span>: {key : value} <span class="hljs-comment">//optinal for passing custom values only </span>
})
<span class="hljs-comment">// you can get tbl_options on next command like  </span>
tbl_options.<span class="hljs-property">key</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// "onSuccess" command will receive options = HTTP response</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// "onError" command will receive options = HTTP error</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// on success you will get content and in error command you will get error </span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// error command only run when there an internal error like request failed due to some reasons like </span>
<span class="hljs-comment">// wrong url, API have 500 etc...</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">//</span>
</code></pre>
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>

<div class="code-container">
<pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Example success command</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">/*command: onSuccess*/</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Fetched title: "</span> + content)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Example error command</span>
<span class="hljs-comment">/*command: onError*/</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"HTTP request failed: "</span> + error.<span class="hljs-property">status</span>)
</code></pre>
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>

<h3 id="http-advanced">4. Advanced Options<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<ul>
  <li><b>headers</b> – Custom headers</li>
  <li><b>body</b> – Object or data to send in POST requests</li>
  <li><b>query</b> – Object of query parameters for GET requests</li>
  <li><b>timeout</b> – Request timeout in milliseconds</li>
</ul>

<div class="code-container">
<pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// GET with query params and headers, and success/error commands</span>
<span class="hljs-variable constant_">HTTP</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>({
  <span class="hljs-attr">url</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"https://api.example.com/search"</span>,
  <span class="hljs-attr">query</span>: { <span class="hljs-attr">q</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"telebot"</span>, <span class="hljs-attr">limit</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5</span> },
  <span class="hljs-attr">headers</span>: { <span class="hljs-string">"X-Api-Key"</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"123ABC"</span> },
  <span class="hljs-attr">timeout</span>: <span class="hljs-number">5000</span>,
  <span class="hljs-attr">success</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"searchSuccess"</span>,
  <span class="hljs-attr">error</span>: <span class="hljs-string">"searchError"</span>
})
</code></pre>
<button class="copy-btn" onclick="if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; copyCode(this)">Copy</button>
</div>
<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display: block; text-align: center; height: 280px;" data-ad-layout="in-article" data-ad-format="fluid" data-ad-client="ca-pub-2719295794573158" data-ad-slot="8142878854" data-adsbygoogle-status="done"><div id="aswift_12_host" style="border: none; height: 280px; width: 885px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; position: relative; visibility: visible; background-color: transparent; display: inline-block;"></div></ins>

     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
</script>
<h3 id="http-usage-notes">Usage Notes<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<ul>
  <li>All HTTP methods return <code>response</code> object on callback command: <code>{ ok, status, data or error }</code>.</li>
  <li>You can use <code>await</code> to wait for the response or skip it if not needed.</li>
  <li>If <code>error</code> command is missing, the <code>success</code> command will run instead.</li>
</ul>

<!-- User Class -->
<h2 id="class-user">User Class<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h2>
<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display: block; height: 221px;" data-ad-format="fluid" data-ad-layout-key="-fb+5w+4e-db+86" data-ad-client="ca-pub-2719295794573158" data-ad-slot="8786409519" data-adsbygoogle-status="done"><div id="aswift_13_host" style="border: none; height: 221px; width: 885px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; position: relative; visibility: visible; background-color: transparent; display: inline-block;"></div></ins>
<script type="text/javascript">
     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
</script>
<p>
  The <b>User</b> class is used to store and manage data for each user individually.
  Every user has their own private storage, and these methods let you save, read, and delete that data.
</p>

<h3 id="class-user-basic">1. Basic Operations<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Use these methods to save and read single values for the current user.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Save user data</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"name"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"Alice"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"age"</span>, <span class="hljs-number">25</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"number"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Read user data</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> name = <span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"name"</span>)      <span class="hljs-comment">// "Alice"</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> age = <span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getProp</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"age"</span>)    <span class="hljs-comment">// 25</span>

<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Name: "</span> + name + <span class="hljs-string">", Age: "</span> + age)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → Name: Alice, Age: 25</span>
</code></pre>
</div>

<h3 id="class-user-del">2. Deleting Properties<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Remove specific values when you don’t need them anymore.
  If the property doesn’t exist, it just returns <code>null</code> when read.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Delete property</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">del</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"age"</span>)

<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> age = <span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"age"</span>)        <span class="hljs-comment">// null</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"After delete, age = "</span> + age)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → After delete, age = null</span>
</code></pre>
</div>

<h3 id="class-user-bulk">3. Bulk Operations<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  You can work with all stored data at once. This is useful to inspect or reset the user’s storage.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Save multiple values</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"country"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"India"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"verified"</span>, <span class="hljs-literal">true</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"boolean"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get all user data</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> all = <span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getAll</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(all)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → { "name": "Alice", "country": "India", "verified": true }</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Delete all properties</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">delAll</span>()

<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> all2 = <span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getAll</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(all2)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → {}</span>
</code></pre>
</div>

<h3 id="user-check">4. Checking & Counting<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Check if data exists, count stored keys, or list property names.
</p>
<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display: block; height: 221px;" data-ad-format="fluid" data-ad-layout-key="-fb+5w+4e-db+86" data-ad-client="ca-pub-2719295794573158" data-ad-slot="8786409519" data-adsbygoogle-status="done"><div id="aswift_14_host" style="border: none; height: 221px; width: 885px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; position: relative; visibility: visible; background-color: transparent; display: inline-block;"></div></ins>
<script type="text/javascript">
     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
</script>
<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Check if property exists</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> hasName = <span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">has</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"name"</span>)   <span class="hljs-comment">// true or false</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Count total properties</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> total = <span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">count</span>()         <span class="hljs-comment">// e.g. 2</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get property names</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> names = <span class="hljs-title class_">User</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getNames</span>()      <span class="hljs-comment">// ["name", "country"]</span>

<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>({ hasName, total, names })
<span class="hljs-comment">// → { "hasName": true, "total": 2, "names": ["name", "country"] }</span>
</code></pre>
</div>
<!-- we will add that soon 
<h3 id="user-batch">5. Batch Operations</h3>
<p>
  Fetch multiple values at once instead of calling <code>User.get()</code> many times.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js">
// Save multiple values
User.set("theme", "dark")
User.set("lang", "en")

// Get multiple values at once
let data = User.getMultiple(["theme", "lang", "name"])
Bot.inspect(data)
// → { "theme": "dark", "lang": "en", "name": "Alice" }
</code></pre>
</div>
-->
<h3 id="class-user-notes">Notes<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<ul>
  <li>All methods only work for the current user — no other user can access this data.</li>
  <li><code>get</code>, <code>set</code>, and <code>del</code> have multiple aliases (like <code>getProp</code>, <code>getProperty</code>).</li>
  <li>Reading data is <b>synchronous</b> and returns the value directly.</li>
  <li>Saving and deleting are <b>asynchronous</b>, but you don’t need <code>await</code> — they just return <code>undefined</code>.</li>
</ul>

<!-- Global Class -->
<h2 id="class-global">Global Class<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h2>
<!-- docad -->
<ins class="adsbygoogle" style="display: block; height: 280px;" data-ad-client="ca-pub-2719295794573158" data-ad-slot="4335444793" data-ad-format="auto" data-full-width-responsive="true" data-adsbygoogle-status="done"><div id="aswift_15_host" style="border: none; height: 280px; width: 885px; margin: 0px; padding: 0px; position: relative; visibility: visible; background-color: transparent; display: inline-block;"></div></ins>
<script type="text/javascript">
     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
</script>
<p>
  The <b>Global</b> class is used to store and manage data at the account level.
  All data stored here is shared across all bots under the same owner account and can be accessed by any bot.

<h3 id="class-global-basic">1. Basic Operations<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Use these methods to save and read global values that are accessible to all your bots.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Save global data (shared across all bots)</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"company_name"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"TechCorp"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"max_bot_instances"</span>, <span class="hljs-number">5</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"number"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"supported_languages"</span>, [<span class="hljs-string">"en"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"es"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"fr"</span>], <span class="hljs-string">"list"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Read global data</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> company = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"company_name"</span>)           <span class="hljs-comment">// "TechCorp"</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> maxBots = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getProp</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"max_bot_instances"</span>) <span class="hljs-comment">// 5</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> languages = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"supported_languages"</span>) <span class="hljs-comment">// ["en", "es", "fr"]</span>

<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Company: "</span> + company + <span class="hljs-string">", Max Bots: "</span> + maxBots)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → Company: TechCorp, Max Bots: 5</span>
</code></pre>
</div>

<h3 id="class-global-del">2. Deleting Properties<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Remove global values when they are no longer needed across all bots.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Delete global property</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">del</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"max_bot_instances"</span>)

<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> maxBots = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">get</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"max_bot_instances"</span>) <span class="hljs-comment">// null</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"After delete, max bots = "</span> + maxBots)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → After delete, max bots = null</span>
</code></pre>
</div>

<h3 id="class-global-bulk">3. Bulk Operations<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Manage all global data at once. Useful for configuration management and data migration.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Save multiple global values</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"api_key"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"sk-123456789"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"webhook_url"</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"https://api.example.com/webhook"</span>)
<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">set</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"maintenance_mode"</span>, <span class="hljs-literal">false</span>, <span class="hljs-string">"boolean"</span>)

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get all global data</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> allGlobal = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getAll</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(allGlobal)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → { "company_name": "TechCorp", "api_key": "sk-123456789", "webhook_url": "https://...", "maintenance_mode": false }</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Delete all global properties</span>
<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">delAll</span>()

<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> allEmpty = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getAll</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(allEmpty)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → {}</span>
</code></pre>
</div>

<h3 id="global-check">4. Checking & Counting<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Check if global data exists, count stored keys, or list all global property names.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Check if global property exists</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> hasCompany = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">has</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"company_name"</span>)   <span class="hljs-comment">// true or false</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Count total global properties</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> totalGlobal = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">count</span>()              <span class="hljs-comment">// e.g. 3</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get all global property names</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> globalNames = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getNames</span>()           <span class="hljs-comment">// ["company_name", "api_key", "webhook_url"]</span>

<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>({ hasCompany, totalGlobal, globalNames })
<span class="hljs-comment">// → { "hasCompany": true, "totalGlobal": 3, "globalNames": ["company_name", "api_key", "webhook_url"] }</span>
</code></pre>
</div>

<h3 id="global-storage">5. Storage Monitoring<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Monitor your total storage usage across all data types: Bot properties + User properties + Global properties.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Get detailed storage information (includes bot + user + global data)</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> storageInfo = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getStorageInfo</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">inspect</span>(storageInfo)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → { "size": 1572864, "prop_count": 42, "last_calc": "2024-01-15T10:30:00.000Z" }</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get storage usage percentage (0-100%)</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> usagePercent = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getStorageUsage</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Storage usage: "</span> + usagePercent + <span class="hljs-string">"%"</span>)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → Storage usage: 7.5%</span>

<span class="hljs-comment">// Check if storage is near limit (90% threshold)</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">isStorageNearLimit</span>()) {
  <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"⚠️ Storage almost full! Please clean up some data."</span>)
}

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get available storage in MB</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> availableMB = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getAvailableStorage</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Available storage: "</span> + availableMB + <span class="hljs-string">" MB"</span>)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → Available storage: 18.5 MB</span>
</code></pre>
</div>

<h3 id="global-utility">6. Utility Methods<i class="fas fa-link anchor-link" title="Copy link"></i></h3>
<p>
  Additional methods for validation and debugging of global storage.
</p>

<div class="code-container">
  <pre><code class="language-js hljs language-javascript" data-highlighted="yes">
<span class="hljs-comment">// Check if owner configuration is valid</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">if</span> (<span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">isOwnerValid</span>()) {
  <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"✅ Global storage is properly configured"</span>)
} <span class="hljs-keyword">else</span> {
  <span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"❌ Owner mail configuration missing"</span>)
}

<span class="hljs-comment">// Get owner email (for debugging)</span>
<span class="hljs-keyword">let</span> ownerMail = <span class="hljs-title class_">Global</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">getOwnerMail</span>()
<span class="hljs-title class_">Bot</span>.<span class="hljs-title function_">sendMessage</span>(<span class="hljs-string">"Owner account: "</span> + ownerMail)
<span class="hljs-comment">// → Owner account: owner@example.com</span>
</code></pre>
</div>
